CURRENT_PRODUCTION_SMOKE.note: read-only GET; no mutation, no submission

LEGACY_STAGING.reason: dead deployment; no authoritative record or active ownership. Not counted in REQ-CP-TEST.
LEGACY_STAGING.history_preserved: the spec file and its prior failing evidence are retained, not deleted.
LEGACY_STAGING.re_add_rule: a new staging env may be added later ONLY with an authoritative deployment record and active ownership.

prohibition: Do not invent or guess a replacement staging URL.
